title: TLS 1.3 Configuration and Secure Channels in Go · Runtime Contract: Crypto Go Tls Config Safe
summary: A Go service disables verification to fix staging, pins one leaf certificate forever, exposes secrets in key logs, and claims a successful handshake authenticates application users. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the tls config safe increment in TLS 1.3 client/server security profile. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causa…
objectives: Configure current Go TLS defaults, minimum versions, certificates, roots, names, ALPN, timeouts, and safe verification hooks without insecure skip shortcuts.
Trace TLS negotiation, key exchange, certificate or PSK authentication, transcript binding, record protection, resumption, and closure.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Tls Config Safe · Theory Crypto Go Tls Config Safe
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 3476 during a post-quantum compatibility canary. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate a TLS 1.3 channel on peer context, certificate verification, replay policy, and live transfer evidence; cap bytes, work, memory, time, attempts, concurrency, and retained secret material before use; then change one authenticated byte and prove clean rejection without partial effect. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Configure current Go TLS defaults, minimum versions, certificates, roots, names, ALPN, timeouts, and safe verification hooks without insecure skip shortcuts.
